paper_title: Materials and methods from fossil study at Kemiklitepe-E

methods.description: Process for measuring dental and postcranial fossil material using electronic callipers to ensure precision.

steps.description: All measurements of dental and postcranial material were taken with an electronic calliper, with a precision of ± 0.2 mm, and are given in millimetres.
steps.searchable_summary: measure fossil material using electronic callipers

steps.description: For dental elements, width measurements were taken at the base of the crown, and length measurements represent the maximum anteroposterior measure.
steps.searchable_summary: process dental measurements for width and length

methods.description: Statistical analyses and graph compilation using PAST software to interpret fossil measurements.

steps.description: All statistical analyses and graphs were compiled using PAST.
steps.searchable_summary: perform statistical analysis and graphing using PAST
